division_title: REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE
text: If a check in payment of a fee or penalty is not paid by the bank on which it is drawn on its first presentation, the person tendering the check remains liable for the payment of the fee, or fee and penalty, as if he had not tendered the check. The department in its discretion may redeposit a check in payment of the fee, or the fee and penalty, not more than once without assessing additional penalties.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 3. REGISTRATION OF VEHICLES AND CERTIFICATES OF TITLE [4000 - 9808]
### Chapter 6. Registration and Weight Fees [9101 - 9808]
#### Article 4. Payment of Fees [9550 - 9564]
##### § 9558

If a check in payment of a fee or penalty is not paid by the bank on which it is drawn on its first presentation, the person tendering the check remains liable for the payment of the fee, or fee and penalty, as if he had not tendered the check. The department in its discretion may redeposit a check in payment of the fee, or the fee and penalty, not more than once without assessing additional penalties.

*(Amended by Stats. 1969, Ch. 214.)*

subsections.text: If a check in payment of a fee or penalty is not paid by the bank on which it is drawn on its first presentation, the person tendering the check remains liable for the payment of the fee, or fee and penalty, as if he had not tendered the check. The department in its discretion may redeposit a check in payment of the fee, or the fee and penalty, not more than once without assessing additional penalties.
